title: The Bountiful Beetle,
content:
The Bountiful Beetle,
    who always carried a Green Umbrella when it didn't rain,
    and left it at home when it did.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Bountiful Beetle,"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
